name: A4000 tight (AWQ)
description: Conservative VRAM budget for a single RTX A4000 (16 GB). Caps the KV cache to keep paged-attention warmup under 14 GB, prefers FP16 weights, and uses AWQ quantization to fit 7B models with room for batching.

name: H100 single-shot
description: Generous batch/context budget for a single H100 80GB. Targets latency-sensitive single-conversation workloads — long context, BF16 weights, gpu_memory_utilization 0.92. Tune max_num_seqs upward for batched serving.

name: Dev (tiny)
description: Minimal settings for dev/test on small models (Qwen-0.5B, opt-125m). Short context, gpu_memory_utilization 0.5 so this process fits alongside other workloads, eager mode so failures surface fast.

name: MoE balanced (2x A4000)
description: Tensor-parallel split for MoE models like Mixtral 8x7B across two A4000s. Tunes gpu_memory_utilization (0.86), max_model_len (16K), and dtype (BF16). After applying, set tensor_parallel_size to 2 manually and ensure gpu_indices lists both target GPUs.
